parameters.name: exclude_prefix
parameters.description: Excludes configuration keys that start with any of the supplied prefixes. When combined with prefix, exclusion is applied to the allow-listed keys.

schema.description: Excludes configuration keys that start with any of the supplied prefixes. When combined with prefix, exclusion is applied to the allow-listed keys.

parameters.name: resolve_remote
parameters.description: Intended for control resolution. If true, evaluates and includes remote cohort-based contexts during config resolution.

schema.description: Intended for control resolution. If true, evaluates and includes remote cohort-based contexts during config resolution.
